source.description: A reviewed six-panel felt-tip marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free angel halo with a matching pair of small wings on warm paper, drawn as the symbol itself with no head, person, text, religious figure, sticker outline, badge frame, or decorative border.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one tilted halo ellipse and two wing axes, wraps the halo ring and wing silhouettes, adds all feather layers and the halo interior, introduces a few sparkle accents, then inks and colors every established shape before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: tilted halo ellipse, inner ellipse guide, two wing axes, and wing envelopes
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one floating oval halo with a consistent inner opening and two balanced outward-sweeping wing shapes.

final_elements.name: thick halo ring and paired rounded wing silhouettes
final_elements.description: A chunky ring and two readable wings follow the original guides without becoming a badge or enclosing border.

final_elements.name: three feather layers on each wing and clarified inner halo opening
final_elements.description: Three broad feather tiers on each wing and a clean inner ellipse establish the full symbol structure.

final_elements.name: three small sparkle bursts, short motion ticks, and soft floating shadow
final_elements.description: Three compact sparkles, a few short lift marks, and one shallow shadow add energy without enclosing the symbol.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with golden-yellow, pale blue, lavender, and raspberry marker accents
final_elements.description: Bold marker reinforces all established shapes while warm yellow colors the halo and cool marker accents shade the wings, sparkles, and shadow.

frames.visible_job: Places one tilted outer halo ellipse, its inner ellipse guide, two wing axes, and matching wing envelopes at one fixed scale.
introduces: tilted halo ellipse, inner ellipse guide, two wing axes, and wing envelopes

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with one thick halo ring and two rounded outward-sweeping wing silhouettes.
introduces: thick halo ring and paired rounded wing silhouettes
requires_prior_elements: tilted halo ellipse, inner ellipse guide, two wing axes, and wing envelopes

frames.visible_job: Adds three broad feather layers to each established wing and clarifies the existing inner halo opening.
introduces: three feather layers on each wing and clarified inner halo opening
requires_prior_elements: thick halo ring and paired rounded wing silhouettes

frames.visible_job: Adds three small sparkle bursts, a few short motion ticks, and a soft floating shadow around the established halo and wings.
introduces: three small sparkle bursts, short motion ticks, and soft floating shadow
requires_prior_elements: thick halo ring and paired rounded wing silhouettes
three feather layers on each wing and clarified inner halo opening

frames.step_name: Ink and color the angel symbol
frames.visible_job: Thickens every established contour and fills the halo, wing shadows, sparkles, motion ticks, and floating shadow with visible marker texture.
introduces: thick black outline with golden-yellow, pale blue, lavender, and raspberry marker accents
requires_prior_elements: thick halo ring and paired rounded wing silhouettes
three feather layers on each wing and clarified inner halo opening
three small sparkle bursts, short motion ticks, and soft floating shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established halo, feather layers, sparkles, motion ticks, marker fills, highlight gaps, and floating shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight gaps on established halo and feather shapes

rejection_checks: No halo contour, inner opening, wing, feather layer, sparkle, motion tick, color area, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The halo and wings must retain one tilt, spacing, feather count, scale, and crop across every frame.
Both wings must remain clearly paired but handmade rather than mechanically mirrored.
Reject heads, faces, people, religious figures, text, clouds around the symbol, enclosing outlines, sticker edges, badge frames, or decorative borders.
Reject glossy vector icon art, airbrushed gradients, smooth digital symmetry, or polished poster rendering.
